content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

November 21, 1990

Timothy J. Staffel  
Moomau and Staffel  
1001 South Broadway  
Santa Maria, California 93454-6605

Re: Your Request for Confirmation of Telephone Advice  
Our File No. I-90-645

Dear Mr. Staffel:

This is in response to your request for confirmation of telephone advice provided to you concerning the contents of a campaign statement under the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 Because your request is a general inquiry, we consider your request to be one for informal assistance.2 Furthermore, because the Commission does not provide advice concerning past conduct, the advice is prospective in its application (Regulation 18239).

This letter summarizes the advice given to you on October 9, 1990.3 On the basis of the facts provided, you were advised that Section 84211 requires the street address to be disclosed for each person making a contribution, or to whom an expenditure has been made, of one hundred dollars ($100) or more during the period covered by the campaign statement. You were also advised that the street address may be an address inside or outside the candidate's jurisdiction. If you report only local addresses, nothing in the Act establishes a preference for a local

---

1 Government Code Section 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

2 Informal assistance does not provide the requestor with the immunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice. (Section 83114; Regulation 18239(c).)

3 Your letter reflects your comments about your campaign strategy and political beliefs. However, the advice given to you was limited to specified requirements of the Act.

address when disclosing contributions received or expenditures made.

I hope this letter has provided you with the guidance you requested. Please contact me if you have any further questions regarding this matter at (916) 322-5901.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

[Signature]
By: Luisa Menchaca
Counsel, Legal Division

LM:aa
